error.title: Something went wrong
error.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

controls.expoGoWarning: Audio only available in native build.

schedule.title: Weekly Schedule
schedule.noProgramsHint: Check back later for upcoming shows.

exitAppConfirm.title: Close application
exitAppConfirm.message: The radio will be stopped and the app will be closed. Do you want to continue?

social.communityText: We are more than a radio station - we are a community. Each program is designed to bring value to your day, whether through practical health tips, inspiration for your goals, or simply good conversations to unwind.

reminderRemoved.title: Reminder removed
reminderRemoved.message: The reminder for "{{show}}" has been disabled.

reminderActivated.title: Reminder activated
reminderActivated.message:
You will receive a notification {{minutes}} minutes before "{{show}}" starts.

The time will be automatically adjusted to your timezone.

permissionRequired.title: Permission required
permissionRequired.message: Please allow notifications in your device settings to receive reminders.

permissionsRequired.title: Permissions Required
permissionsRequired.message: To receive show reminders, you need to allow notifications in your device settings.

activeReminders.title: Active Reminders

noActiveReminders.title: No Active Reminders
noActiveReminders.message: Tap the bell next to any show in the weekly schedule to get a heads-up before it starts.

notifications.timezoneInfo: Times in Portugal (PT). We automatically adjust to your timezone.
notifications.androidExactAlarmInfo: On Android 12 and later, the system may delay reminders by a few minutes to save battery. For maximum precision, enable "Alarms & reminders" in system settings.

myReminders.title: My Reminders
myReminders.emptyHint: Tap the bell next to any show in the weekly schedule, or use the bell in the header to manage all reminders at once.

permissionRequired.title: Permission Required
permissionRequired.message: To get weather data for your location, you need to allow location access in your device settings.

weather.locationBanner: Showing data for Lisbon. Tap to enable location.
weather.error: Error loading weather data. Please try again.

news.title: News
news.subtitle: The latest news for you
news.loadError: Error loading news. Please try again.
news.openSourceErrorMessage: Check your internet connection and try again.

errors.offline: No internet connection. Check your network and try again.
errors.timeout: The server took too long to respond. Please try again.
errors.server: The server is having issues. Please try again shortly.

accessibility.tapToRead: Tap to read the full article

radio.title: Radio
radio.autoPlayDesc: Start radio when opening the app
radio.stopOnCloseDesc: By default the radio keeps playing in the background. Enable to stop when closing the app.

premium.title: Premium
premium.thankYou: Thank you for supporting Olha que Duas. Enjoy the ad-free experience.
premium.removeAdsDesc: Support Olha que Duas and remove all ads with a one-time payment.

about.title: About
about.description: Olha que Duas is a Portuguese online radio that combines entertainment, wellness, and authentic conversations. With diverse programming ranging from nutrition and motivation to relaxed debates, we are on air 24 hours a day to keep you company.
about.appTagline: Official Olha que Duas Radio app

unavailable.title: Unavailable
unavailable.message: Purchases are not available in this test version.

success.title: Purchase completed!
success.message: Thank you for supporting Olha que Duas! Ads have been removed.

error.title: Purchase error
error.message: Could not complete the purchase. Please try again.

restored.title: Purchase restored!
restored.message: Your purchase has been successfully restored.

notFound.title: No purchase found
notFound.message: We could not find any previous purchase associated with your account.

consent.title: Your privacy
consent.description: We use cookies and similar technologies to display ads. You can choose how your data is used:
consent.personalizedDesc: Ads based on your interests and browsing history. Data is processed by Google AdMob.
consent.nonPersonalizedDesc: Generic ads that do not use your personal data for personalization.

reset.title: Reset preferences
reset.message: Do you want to reset your ad preferences? The consent dialog will be shown again.

resetSuccess.title: Preferences reset
resetSuccess.message: Restart the app to see the consent dialog again.

consent.mustChoose: Please choose a consent option to continue.

android.title: Exit application
android.message: Are you sure you want to exit?

ios.title: Information
ios.message: On iOS, swipe up from the bottom of the screen and drag the app up to close it.

ads.title: Advertisement
ads.helpKeepFree: Ads help keep the app free
